# Copilot Instructions

## List of skills :
### Acceptance Testing
Use this skill when writing or completing acceptance tests.
Always follow the conventions and principles defined in:
`.github/skills/acceptance-test/SKILL.md`.


### Test Utilities Judgement
The ability to critically evaluate the correctness and robustness of test utilities
(e.g. Seeder, Robot, assertion helpers).

This skill must be applied:
- Before using an existing test utility
- When creating or modifying test utilities
- During acceptance test exploration if utilities are involved


The detailed principles are defined in:
`.github/skills/test-utilities-judgement/SKILL.md`
